title: Integrate advertisement placeholders into the gaming website

requirements.text: Add a responsive top sticky banner ad container displayed below the existing navigation bar in RootLayout. On desktop it must be 90px tall and full width; on mobile it must be 60px tall and full width. Label it 'Ad Space' with a colored placeholder box. Include clear HTML comments marking where to paste Google AdSense and Adsterra scripts later. The compact mobile nav must remain visible (not hidden) when this banner is shown.

quotes: 90px height on desktop / 60px height on mobile

acceptanceCriteria: Banner renders below the nav bar, not above it
Banner is 90px tall on desktop (≥768px) and 60px tall on mobile
Banner is full width and sticky at the top of the viewport (below nav)
Placeholder shows a colored box labeled 'Ad Space'
Comments clearly mark AdSense and Adsterra integration points
Mobile navigation bar remains visible and compact when the top banner is shown
Banner does not overlap any game UI or nav elements

requirements.text: Add a responsive bottom sticky banner ad container rendered in RootLayout. It must be full width, mobile-friendly, and sticky at the bottom of the viewport. It must not overlap or block any gameplay controls (e.g., on-screen buttons, canvas interactions). Label it 'Ad Space' with a colored placeholder box. Include clear HTML comments marking where to paste Google AdSense and Adsterra scripts later.
acceptanceCriteria: Banner is sticky at the bottom of the viewport across all screen sizes
Banner is full width and does not overlap on-screen game controls or canvas
Placeholder shows a colored box labeled 'Ad Space'
Comments clearly mark AdSense and Adsterra integration points
Game canvas and controls remain fully accessible above the banner

requirements.text: Implement an interstitial ad system that displays a full-screen overlay exclusively after a full Game Over event (not during mid-game crashes). The overlay must include a colored 'Ad Space' placeholder box, a close button (X) in the corner, and auto-close after 5 seconds with a visible countdown. After closing (manually or automatically), the user is returned to the main menu. Include comments marking where to replace the placeholder with a real ad script. This must be integrated with the existing Endless Runner and Highway Rush game pages (and any other game that has a Game Over state) without modifying immutable files.

quotes: Interstitial only after full game over
Show full-screen ad after Game Over
Resume to main menu after close

acceptanceCriteria: Interstitial overlay only appears on full Game Over, not on mid-game crashes
Overlay is full-screen and covers all content
A visible 5-second countdown is displayed
Overlay auto-closes after 5 seconds
Manual close via X button works at any time
After closing, the player is navigated to the main menu
Placeholder shows a colored box labeled 'Ad Space' with comments for real ad script insertion
Does not block gameplay while active (triggers post-game only)

requirements.text: Implement a rewarded ad system that appears after a player crash (not full Game Over). Show a button labeled 'Watch Ad to Continue' on the game over / crash screen. When the player clicks it, display a 5-second simulated countdown mimicking a video ad timer. After the countdown completes, grant the player 1 extra life and resume the game. This option may only be used once per game session. Include comments marking where to replace the placeholder countdown with a real rewarded ad SDK call.

quotes: After crash, show button: 'Watch Ad to Continue'
If user watches ad, give 1 extra life
Can only be used once per game

acceptanceCriteria: 'Watch Ad to Continue' button is visible after a crash (not full Game Over)
Button is disabled / hidden if the rewarded ad has already been used this session
Clicking the button shows a 5-second countdown overlay simulating an ad view
After the countdown completes, the player receives 1 extra life and the game resumes
The rewarded ad can only be triggered once per game session
Comments clearly mark where to integrate a real rewarded ad SDK

requirements.text: Ensure all ad placeholder containers use simple colored boxes (e.g., semi-transparent dark with a neon accent border matching the site theme) with centered 'Ad Space' text. Ad containers must not overlap game UI, nav, or controls. The layout must be fully responsive and maintain smooth gameplay performance — ad rendering must not cause frame drops or freeze the game loop.

quotes: Ads should not freeze the game

acceptanceCriteria: All ad placeholders use styled colored boxes with 'Ad Space' text consistent with the neon dark theme
No ad container overlaps the navigation, game canvas, or on-screen controls
Layout is fully responsive across mobile, tablet, and desktop
Game frame rate is not negatively impacted by ad container rendering
Game does not reload when any ad closes

constraints: Do not modify any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
All ad placeholders must be purely frontend components — no backend changes required
Ad containers must not block or overlay active gameplay controls
Interstitial ad must only fire on full Game Over, never during active gameplay
Rewarded ad may only be granted once per game session
nonGoals: Integrating real AdSense or Adsterra scripts (placeholders only)
Backend persistence of ad view counts or rewards
Hiding or collapsing the mobile navigation when ads are visible
